calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Mitch Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: G.Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

***After hearing, Dismissal of Entire Action was filed. No order issued.***

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to October 4, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
